description: Automatically categorizes HubSpot companies into 15 internal industry categories using LinkedIn enrichment (Amplemarket API) as primary source, website metadata fetch as fallback, and Google Gemini 1.5-Pro for intelligent classification.
keyFeatures: Demo form detection - skips categorization for companies added via form
Three-tier enrichment strategy: LinkedIn (primary) → Website (fallback) → Error alert
Gemini 1.5-Pro intelligent classification with 70% confidence threshold
Manual review routing for uncertain categorizations
Slack notifications for all outcomes (success, manual review, enrichment failed)
HubSpot integration with property update on categorization success
testingNotes: Test with demo form company to verify skip logic
Test with company that has LinkedIn presence
Test with company without LinkedIn but with website
Test with company that has no enrichment data
